name: Reaper
description: Bandit class mod for Krieg the Psycho, built around Blood Twitch, Fuel the Fire, Blood Overdrive.
notes: Krieg class mods, including this one, were added to the drop pool on 18 April 2013.

special.description: At maximum level, Reaper increases team Kill Skill duration by 66 percent. Standard Kill Skills last 7 seconds, extending to 11.6 seconds with this mod. Krieg Kill Skills affected include Blood Bath, Blood Overdrive, Blood Twitch, Fuel the Blood, Fuel the Fire, and Nervous Blood.
